title: Build a calendar app in AI Studio in 6 minutes
summary: A tutorial demonstrating how to build a calendar app using Google AI Studio without coding. The app extracts travel itineraries and converts them into calendar invitations using Gemini's advanced reasoning capabilities.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech tutorial walks through building a calendar app in Google AI Studio without writing code. The app extracts travel itineraries and converts them into calendar invitations, relying on Gemini's reasoning capabilities to parse the source details. The takeaway is a concrete no-code workflow: turning unstructured itinerary information into structured calendar events within AI Studio in about six minutes.
